claim: Fixed blur remains the practical balanced fallback, not a globally obsolete baseline.
limitation: Blur is not privacy-first and does not dominate the final balanced policy.
safe_report_wording: Blur remains the practical balanced fallback under current comparable evidence.

claim: Solid masking is the privacy-first fallback.
limitation: High face-region visual utility loss.
safe_report_wording: Solid masking gives strongest identity suppression where privacy is prioritized over execution-environment face-region utility.

claim: Layered obfuscation is a stronger privacy candidate than blur when modest utility loss is acceptable.
limitation: Still obfuscation, not identity-preserving synthesis.
safe_report_wording: Layered obfuscation improves privacy over blur while retaining more utility than solid masking.

claim: NullFace is fully metrically comparable but quality/runtime bounded.
table_or_figure: Canonical RQ2 comparison and NullFace output manifest
limitation: Visual-quality risks and the 20.389381-second mean runtime prevent default promotion.
safe_report_wording: NullFace provides comparable evidence but is not promoted as default under current quality boundary.

claim: OAPR is a global replacement for fixed blur.
limitation: The seven objective modes produce different privacy, utility, and runtime trade-offs; none establishes universal dominance.
safe_report_wording: OAPR is an objective-aware policy layer with actual 500-frame routed-output evidence, not a global blur replacement.

claim: Multimodal processing extends privacy handling beyond faces.
table_or_figure: 11_rq3_final_summary.md; residual hard-miss campaign; multimodal deployment selection scores
limitation: Presence OAPR can look strong while screen IoU/text precision remain limited; residual text/low-IoU cases and utility loss remain. Presence and localisation scores must both be reported.
safe_report_wording: The multimodal stage uses a reviewed 250-frame protocol with text-cluster screen completion and a strict edge-phone residual when still empty; held-out screen presence FN is 0; combined-risk presence recall is 0.9804 and presence composite 0.9458. Localisation-oriented deployment score (~0.62) reports localisation honesty. Adaptive redaction reaches privacy 0.8680 and score 0.8320 vs fixed blur/fill 0.8319. Perfect localisation and complete PII removal are not claimed.

claim: StyleGAN is unsuitable as a default egocentric anonymiser in this project.
limitation: Project-specific implementation and evidence boundary.
safe_report_wording: StyleID/StyleGAN remains negative/bounded evidence due to egocentric compositing and pose/scale failure modes.

claim: The main RQ1 face-detection ground truth is the reviewed 500-image detection status and completed face boxes.
limitation: Detection ground truth supports face detection, not direct anonymiser quality.
safe_report_wording: RQ1 uses reviewed detection-eval status and face boxes as its primary ground-truth layer.

claim: Multimodal residual-risk review identifies localization and redaction failures.
limitation: The flags use OCR and region-obscuration proxies and do not establish absence of semantic leakage.
safe_report_wording: Held-out residual-risk evidence separates detector misses from text readability screen obscuration and utility failures.

claim: OAPR routes real images through available anonymisation methods and records outputs and explanations.
limitation: Objective-specific routing is bounded by method eligibility and does not establish global superiority over fixed blur.
safe_report_wording: The 500-frame routed-output evaluation demonstrates auditable objective-specific method selection with explicit fallback behaviour.

claim: Reverse Personalization improved after targeted retry but remains incomplete and impractical.
limitation: Final output coverage is 482/500 and runtime remains high.
safe_report_wording: Targeted retry improved Reverse Personalization coverage to 482/500, but residual failures and runtime prevent deployment promotion.

claim: RiDDLE is a numerically strong full-comparable research method but is not default-policy eligible.
table_or_figure: RiDDLE full metrics and final visual eligibility
limitation: Fourteen of 100 reviewed crops showed obvious artifacts; targeted alignment/candidate tuning retained synthetic pose/gaze failure; source licensing is unstated.
safe_report_wording: RiDDLE is quantitatively competitive research evidence, but the visual gate excludes it from default runtime routing.

claim: FALCO provides strong identity suppression but is not the default policy candidate.
table_or_figure: FALCO full comparable metrics and visual review
limitation: Mean runtime is 16.623 seconds/frame and 22/100 reviewed crops show obvious artifacts.
safe_report_wording: FALCO is full-comparable privacy-strong evidence whose runtime and visual quality prevent default routing.

claim: The ungated grouped held-out OAPR policy exceeds fixed layered obfuscation under the declared hardened objective.
limitation: The result is objective- and protocol-specific and does not include executable artifact fallback.
safe_report_wording: The ungated held-out simulation scores 0.909798 versus 0.889789 for fixed layered; it is retained as an upper comparison rather than the final executable policy.

claim: The RiDDLE-heavy materialised policy is a measured historical policy ablation.
limitation: The grouped gate recalled 11/14 reviewed artifacts and did not reliably cover pose/gaze failures; it is not the runtime default.
safe_report_wording: The RiDDLE-heavy policy produced 500/500 measured outputs and a positive objective-specific numerical gain, but was superseded by the visual-safe deterministic policy.

claim: The final visual-safe adaptive policy completes all 500 routes without selecting a generative method.
limitation: Objective-specific evidence on the reviewed CASTLE protocol; no universal dominance or zero-artifact claim.
safe_report_wording: After a uniform visual gate, the final policy routes reviewed no-face frames unchanged and uses deterministic layered or solid-mask anonymisation for face-positive frames, completing 500/500 routes with zero failures.

claim: Author-aligned recipes do not make the evaluated generative methods safe default routes on hard egocentric conditions.
limitation: Five deliberately hard cases do not estimate population-level failure prevalence and the original FAMS checkpoint was inaccessible.
safe_report_wording: Author or author-aligned preprocessing and parameter controls improved isolated artifacts, but no evaluated generative method passed complete coverage, privacy-change, compositing, and pose/expression checks on every hard case.

claim: The final detector policy adopts the error-hardened RF variant for improved balanced OAPR score.
limitation: The error-hardened variant improves the privacy-weighted detector score from 0.9129 to 0.9172 while maintaining high recall.
safe_report_wording: The primary detector policy uses the error-hardened RF on raw+RF-DETR candidates (IoU 0.45) for the balanced objective.

claim: Gated deployment selection is the deployable decision layer; exploratory composites remain comparison evidence.
table_or_figure: decision framework body under outputs/05_oapr; sensitivity figure; stage mirrors
limitation: The gated framework does not replace all exploratory numerical tables; some rankings are objective-dependent under gates.
safe_report_wording: Exploratory weighted composites supported method exploration. The in-body decision framework adds gates, presence vs localisation multimodal scores, sensitivity, and Pareto analysis for deployable selection (progressive evaluation design).

claim: Multimodal residual hard-miss work remains open for further detector-stack promotion.
table_or_figure: residual hard-miss boundary; residual case ledger
limitation: Further default-stack changes require a new protocol or detector family with stronger development-gated evidence.
safe_report_wording: Screen-presence cascade is closed (FN 5→1→0). Remaining residual classes are frozen limitations (detector-incapable text, low-IoU screen hyp, residual readability, fill utility cost), not unfinished default-policy work.

claim: Localisation-oriented multimodal detection deployment score is 0.633348 on the held-out 75-image split (not a presence-only score).
limitation: This score weights screen IoU and text region precision for localisation honesty; it is intentionally lower than presence composite 0.9458.
safe_report_wording: Localisation-oriented multimodal detection score = 0.633348 (held-out test; locked development-selected variants). Presence composite remains 0.9458 and must be dual-reported.

claim: Privacy-verifying cascaded OAPR policy scores 0.900863 on the locked 500-frame surface when assembled from retained per-method outputs (paired gain over layered +0.011074, 95% CI [0.008609, 0.013819]).
limitation: Assembled from retained method outputs (simulation-style materialisation of routes), not a single sequential generative re-run of every advanced method.
safe_report_wording: Cascaded privacy-verifying policy score 0.900863 is simulation_evidence over retained outputs; default deployable policy remains visual-safe deterministic OAPR.

claim: The visual review was a structured author-partner project process rather than a blinded participant study.
limitation: Mixed inherited and heuristic expansion rows are not independent partner ratings.
safe_report_wording: The author and project partner manually inspected and corrected annotations and relevant outputs using dedicated review applications; this was structured project review.

claim: The App objective profiles are distinct from scientific OAPR.
limitation: Fixed App profiles do not reproduce condition-aware scientific routing.
safe_report_wording: OAPR is the adaptive scientific framework; the App uses simplified evidence-selected visual-safe objective profiles.

claim: The exact App runtime detector is a bounded three-source approximation with no assigned scientific score.
limitation: A separately trained three-source candidate score does not validate the currently loaded RF approximation.
safe_report_wording: The App runtime detector reports its exact source bank and model hash without inheriting the seven-source 0.917165 result.

claim: The retained 500-frame execution replays frozen OAPR decisions and logs actual applied operators separately.
limitation: Detector-derived zero-box overrides change applied counts and this is not fresh routing.
safe_report_wording: Frozen scientific decisions are 286/81/133; actual applied operators are 285/72/143.
